exp_desc: HiR2 first pass: structure axis + refine + transfer.
cmd: python3 hyperopt_tune.py --config-name config --max-evals 8 --tune-epochs 100 --tune-patience 10 --seed 1631 --run-group fmoe_hir2 --run-axis hparam --run-phase HIR2_ML1_STRUCT model=featured_moe_hir2_tune dataset=movielens1m eval_mode=session feature_mode=full_v2 gpu_id=4 log_wandb=false enable_tf32=true fmoe_debug_logging=false MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=10 ++search.MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=\[10\] train_batch_size=8192 eval_batch_size=16384 learning_rate=0.001 balance_loss_lambda=0.01 ++search.learning_rate=\[5e-4\,2e-2\] ++search.weight_decay=\[0.0\,1e-6\,1e-5\] ++search.hidden_dropout_prob=\[0.05\,0.15\] ++search.balance_loss_lambda=\[0.005\,0.02\,0.05\] ++search.hir2_stage_merge_mode=\[serial_weighted\,parallel_weighted\] ++search.hir2_stage_allocator_top_k=\[0\,1\,2\] ++search.hir2_stage_allocator_temperature=\[0.8\,1.0\,1.2\]
